mapper.sql: DEPLOY_REQUEST_ID AS "deployRequestId", REQUEST_TYPE AS "requestType", ENV_CODE AS "envCode", BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", MODULE_NAME AS "moduleName", BRANCH_NAME AS "branchName", COMMIT_ID AS "commitId", GRADLE_TASK AS "gradleTask", ARTIFACT_NAME AS "artifactName", STATUS AS "status", REQUEST_USER_ID AS "requestUserId", APPROVE_USER_ID AS "approveUserId", REQUEST_TIME AS "requestTime", APPROVE_TIME AS "approveTime", START_TIME AS "startTime", END_TIME AS "endTime", CAST(ERROR_MESSAGE AS VARCHAR(10000)) AS "errorMessage"
mapper.select: SELECT BUSINESS_CODE AS "businessCode", WAR_NAME AS "warName", WAR_VERSION AS "warVersion", DEPLOYED_AT AS "deployedAt", HEALTH_STATUS AS "healthStatus" FROM OM_DEPLOY_STATUS WHERE BUSINESS_CODE = #{businessCode}
